## What does this PR do?

A 1-3 sentence summary.

## Type of change

- [ ] New section / page
- [ ] New model in the model map
- [ ] Fix to existing content (typo, factual error, broken link)
- [ ] New example in `examples/`
- [ ] New diagram in `assets/diagrams/`

Closes #... (if applicable)

- [ ] main

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My change follows the existing section structure (Why / Taxonomy / Cheat sheet / Decision tree / Production rule / Sources)
- [ ] I have added the paper to [references/papers.md](../../references/papers.md)
- [ ] I have run any example scripts locally to verify they still work
- [ ] If this adds an example, it has docstrings and a `__main__` block
